description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a streamlined, angular fuselage and a predominantly light gray exterior accented by blue-tinted windows and panels. The cockpit is positioned at the very front, featuring a large, multi-pane canopy that wraps around the nose. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with additional vertical and horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear section, giving the aircraft a distinctive, high-tech appearance. The landing gear consists of two main units beneath the fuselage, with a visible ramp or door on the side suggesting an entry point. The surface is smooth and hard, with subtle panel lines and aerodynamic detailing throughout. The overall design suggests a vehicle intended for short-range urban or regional transport, possibly with VTOL or advanced maneuverability features.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with a light gray body, blue-tinted windows, swept mid-mounted wings, and a prominent front cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular cockpit canopy, forward nose, and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swept-back wings, side entry ramp or door, and the compact, streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, rear fuselage detailing, and the broad, angular wing structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue-tinted cockpit, wing configuration, and landing gear beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and integrated vertical stabilizers; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine type and placement not apparent from images.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail with integrated horizontal stabilizers, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, multi-pane canopy; appears to be multi-seat with wide visibility.
